description: Lifecycle hooks for dotnet/runtime — AI disclosure guardrails

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/gh\s+(pr|issue)\s+(create|comment|edit|review|merge)/.test(cmd)){console.error('AI-GENERATED CONTENT DISCLOSURE: When posting to GitHub under a user account (not a bot/copilot app account), include a visible note (e.g. \'> [!NOTE]\') indicating the content was AI/Copilot-generated. Skip only if the user explicitly asked to omit it.')}}catch{}})"

PreToolUse.description: Remind to include AI-generated content disclosure when posting to GitHub via gh CLI
